---
title: "LOG_LINK"
generated: true
description: "The log link :math:`g( mu) =  log  mu`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats._family`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:LOG_LINK -->
```python
LOG_LINK = Link(name='log', link=_log_link, linkinv=_safe_exp, mu_eta=_safe_exp, eta_bound=_ETA_MAX)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:LOG_LINK -->
The log link $g(\mu) = \log \mu$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
